# keep

keep is a buyer's rebate program offered by Conflux Real Estate, LLC, a licensed Arizona real estate brokerage specializing in new home construction.

## What we do
We represent buyers purchasing new construction homes in Phoenix, Arizona. We give back up to 2/3 of the buyer's broker commission at closing — typically $10,000–$20,000 — credited directly to the buyer at closing.

## How it works
Buyers find a new home community on their own. They contact keep before their first visit so we can register as their broker of record. We handle the contract, upgrades, and closing process. The rebate is credited at closing.

## Critical rule
Buyers must contact keep before visiting any community for the first time. If a buyer visits without prior registration, they lose their rebate eligibility.

## In-person registration
Some builders require in-person broker registration. Buyers should notify keep at least two business days before their planned visit if in-person registration is required.

## Services provided
- Broker registration with the community
- Contract review and negotiation
- Upgrade selection guidance
- Closing coordination
- Referrals to inspectors and mortgage providers as needed

## Services not provided
- In-person tours or property visits
- Home inspections
- Legal or financial advice
- Mortgage origination

## Contact
Phone/text: 602-935-6585 (Sagar Patel)
Email: sagar@buywithkeep.com
License: Conflux Real Estate, LLC — Licensed Arizona Real Estate Brokerage

## Coverage
All new home communities in Phoenix, AZ that offer a buyer's commission. New construction only — no resale homes.
